current_assets.description: Harborlight Museum wordmark or compact lighthouse-line mark
Archival harbor, dock, map, or maritime artifact visual direction with restrained museum treatment
Thin copper rules, coordinate ticks, or map-grid marks

non_primary_assets.limits: Do not use as a mascot, logo, or dominant background.

selection_note: Use current_assets for active design choices unless deprecated_assets.json marks an item or direction as ineligible.
